amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 8 — paragraph 2
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 8 — paragraph 2

## Text proposed by the Commission

2. The intended purpose of the high-risk AI system and the risk management system referred to in Article 9 shall be taken into account when ensuring compliance with those requirements.

## Amendment of the European Parliament

2. The intended purpose of the high-risk AI system , the reasonably foreseeable misuses and the risk management system referred to in Article 9 shall be taken into account when ensuring compliance with those requirements.
commission_text: 2. The intended purpose of the high-risk AI system and the risk management system referred to in Article 9 shall be taken into account when ensuring compliance with those requirements.
parliament_text: 2. The intended purpose of the high-risk AI system , the reasonably foreseeable misuses and the risk management system referred to in Article 9 shall be taken into account when ensuring compliance with those requirements.
